basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Department Odisha
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Helper Notification 2026 has been released on 03 July 2026 on the official website of WCD Odisha. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Minimum 18 years and maximum 35 years as on 01.01.2026.
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years (as on 01.01.2026)

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 12th pass. Must have Odia knowledge. For those who passed 10th from other boards, must have passed 7th class in Odia.
qualification.details: Must be a permanent resident of the Anganwadi center area. Must have a valid permanent resident certificate issued by the local Tahasildar. Minimum 12th pass. Must have knowledge of Odia. If passed 10th from a board other than the Board of Secondary Education, Odisha, must have passed at least 7th class in Odia and submit a certificate from an institution recognized by the Government of Odisha. If belonging to ST/SC category, must upload a valid caste certificate issued by the competent revenue authority. Widow/Orphan/Deserted/Divorced women will be given preference. Must be willing to assist Anganwadi workers in the daily activities of the center. Must be willing to cook and feed children and assist Anganwadi workers.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Must be a permanent resident of the Anganwadi center area. Must have a valid permanent resident certificate issued by the local Tahasildar. Minimum 12th pass. Must have knowledge of Odia. If passed 10th from a board other than the Board of Secondary Education, Odisha, must have passed at least 7th class in Odia and submit a certificate from an institution recognized by the Government of Odisha. If belonging to ST/SC category, must upload a valid caste certificate issued by the competent revenue authority. Widow/Orphan/Deserted/Divorced women will be given preference. Must be willing to assist Anganwadi workers in the daily activities of the center. Must be willing to cook and feed children and assist Anganwadi workers.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years (as on 01.01.2026)

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Sahayika recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Sahayika recruitment is 17th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum educational qualification required for Anganwadi Sahayika?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is passing the 12th grade. Candidates must also possess knowledge of the Odia language.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Anganwadi Sahayika post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Anganwadi Sahayika post is between 18 years and 35 years as of January 1, 2026.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Anganwadi Sahayika post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for the Anganwadi Sahayika posts in WCD Odisha.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for this recruitment through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Anganwadi Sahayika?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Anganwadi Sahayika post primarily involves Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any preferences for certain categories of women?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to widow, orphan, deserted, or divorced women.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Anganwadi Sahayika position is temporary.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 59G/2026.
